what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only attachment record that links a channel-memory item to a board item using a board:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
file body after frontmatter is empty
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme
no payload or explanatory content beyond metadata
concerns: no content beyond metadata to explain the attachment's meaning
target board item is referenced only by opaque UUID
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that points a channel-memory attachment at board item item-3c8e19c0.
questions: What does board item item-3c8e19c0 represent?
Is there supposed to be a payload or description in the body?
apparent_themes: linking channel discussions to board items
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to persist the fact that a channel-memory attachment is associated with a specific board item.
novelty: It is an attachment file that contains only frontmatter and a board:// target URI, with no additional body content.
contribution: It contributes a durable, file-based reference that records an attachment type, a target board item URI, and a creation timestamp for later fusion and traversal.
summary_for_embedding: A metadata-only channel-memory attachment file of type board_items targeting board://item-3c8e19c0, created on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel-memory attachment is linked to a specific board item.
